## Improvements

- Redesign the "我的" page with dedicated Favorites and History entry pages that reuse the discover-style comic grid layout.
- Remember the latest visited chapter for each comic and highlight it directly in the chapter list with a clear "上次看到这里" marker.
- Make reader chapter controls hideable and bring them back from the lower half of the screen for less intrusive reading.
- Make fullscreen reader mode use the top status-bar / cutout area instead of leaving an obvious gap.
- Replace the old multi-card loading placeholder with a single centered loading indicator.

## Fixes

- Fix chapter list cards overflowing when long chapter titles or the last-read marker are present.
- Fix history cover taps to open the comic detail page directly instead of jumping back into a chapter.
- Fix fullscreen mode still feeling unchanged because reader content kept extra top padding.

## Packaging

- Bump the app version to `1.3.0+4`.
- Add regression coverage for reader progress persistence and the updated profile interactions.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/huangusaki/EasyCopy/compare/v1.2.0...v1.3.0
